output:
**(B)**

The claims are inconsistent. "Niche underserved segment that no competitor has addressed" and "$50B TAM" contradict each other. If the segment is truly niche and unaddressed, its TAM is far smaller than $50B. The deck is using the broad industry size as TAM to make the opportunity look large, while simultaneously claiming niche positioning to explain why there are no competitors. Both can't be true — either the market is large (and competitors exist) or it's genuinely niche (and the TAM is much smaller).
